offers, orders, escrow, and settlement for all commerce types Key Features: - Multi-offer types (GENERIC, HOUSING) via ModuleProduct adapters - Community token + stablecoin payments with configurable discounts - Escrow-based order fulfillment with 3-day dispute window - Integration with CommerceDisputes for buyer protection - Revenue routing through cohort system via RevenueRouter Architecture: - Marketplace holds all escrow (no funds in modules) - ModuleProduct adapters (e.g. HousingManager) handle domain logic - CommerceDisputes handles all dispute resolution - RevenueRouter distributes settlement proceeds","errors":{"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token createOffer(uint256,uint8,address,uint25.details: Seller must approve Marketplace to manage productContract resources if applicable

isConsumingScheduledOp().details: Returns true only in the context of a delayed restricted call, at the moment that the scheduled operation is being consumed. Prevents denial of service for delayed restricted calls in the case that the contract performs attacker controlled calls.

openOrderDispute(uint256,string).details: Can only dispute once per order

params.paymentToken: Token to pay with (community token or stablecoin)

setAuthority(address).details: Transfers control to a new authority. The caller must be the current authority.

settleOrder(uint256).details: Sends funds to seller via RevenueRouter

updateOffer(uint256,bool,uint256).details: Only seller can modify their offers

openOrderDispute(uint256,string).notice: Buyer opens a dispute within 3-day window

settleOrder(uint256).notice: Settle order after dispute window expires
